zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean d'Armagnac I於1311年出生時，他的父親Bernard d'Armagnac41歲，母親Cécile de Rodez33歲。他於1327年5月與Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais在法國格斯阿馬尼亞克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年5月16日在法國米迪-列內斯塔-吉加洛波奧蒙吉德-洛馬格享年62歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯格斯奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean d'Armagnac I于1311年出生时，他的父亲Bernard d'Armagnac41岁，母亲Cécile de Rodez33岁。他于1327年5月与Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais在法国格斯阿馬尼亞克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1373年5月16日在法国米迪-列內斯塔-吉加洛波奧蒙吉德-洛馬格享年62岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯格斯奧。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean d'Armagnac I was born in 1311, his father, Bernard d'Armagnac, was 41 and his mother, Cécile de Rodez, was 33. He married Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais in May 1327, in Armagnac, Gers, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 16 May 1373, in Beaumont-de-Lomagne, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean d'Armagnac I est né en 1311, son père, Bernard d'Armagnac, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Cécile de Rodez, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais en mai 1327, à Armagnac, Gers, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1373, à Beaumont-de-Lomagne, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean d'Armagnac I 1311 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard d'Armagnac 41 und seine Mutter Cécile de Rodez 33. Er hat im Mai 1327 in Armagnac, Gers, Frankreich Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Mai 1373 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Beaumont-de-Lomagne, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Armagnac I è nato il nel 1311, il suo padre, Bernard d'Armagnac, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Cécile de Rodez, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais nel maggio 1327, nel Armagnac, Gers, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 maggio 1373, nel Beaumont-de-Lomagne, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean d'Armagnac Iが1311年に生まれた時，父Bernard d'Armagnacは41歳，母Cécile de Rodezは33歳であった。1327年5月にフランスジャーズアルマグナックでBéatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年5月16日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスターン-エト-ガーオンビーウモント-デ-ロマグンで62歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスジャーズアウチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean d'Armagnac I(이)가 1311년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard d'Armagnac(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Cécile de Rodez(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1327년 5월 프랑스 그르스 아마그나크에서 Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 5월 16일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 터아른-트-가니 보몽-데-롬아그니에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 그르스 오치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Armagnac I nasceu em 1311, seu pai, Bernard d'Armagnac, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Cécile de Rodez, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais em maio de 1327, em Armagnac, Gers, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1373, em Beaumont-de-Lomagne, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Auch, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean d'Armagnac I родился в 1311 г., его отцу по имени Bernard d'Armagnac было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Cécile de Rodez, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais май 1327 г. в местности армагнак, джирс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 мая 1373 г. в местности бомонт-де-ломагн, тарн-ет-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ауч, джирс, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean d'Armagnac I nació en 1311, su papá, Bernard d'Armagnac, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Cécile de Rodez, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais en mayo de 1327, en Armagnac, Gers, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1373, en Beaumont-de-Lomagne, Tarn-et-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Auch, Gers, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
